tweet_text: 🚨 Brentford, once predicted for relegation, now sit 7th in the Premier League aiming for their first-ever European spot! With 44 points after 29 games, they're challenging teams with much larger budgets! ⚽️💪 #BrentfordFC #PremierLeague
article_title: Brentford were tipped for relegation. Now they are aiming for Europe
